picks.quote: Give me the champion to continue lapping the division. Give me Merab the machine to win by decision.
I think he's going to stick to him. I think he's going to find the back. I think he wins inside the distance. Give me Alexandre Pantoja by submission.
Brandon Moreno on his best day, at plus money, are you kidding? We'll take that. We'll take that all day long. Give me Brandon Moreno to win this fight by decision.
I think he's going to bust Henry Cejudo up with knees and those hard punches at range, and I think he ends up just winning on the scorecards. So give me Payton Talbott to win this fight by decision.
Give me the legendary Polish power here. I think Jan Błachowicz ends up winning this fight.
I'm going to take the underdog here. I like the size, I like the speed, I like the explosiveness, I like that power... Give me Manel Torres to win this fight by knockout.
I think that Terrance McKinney goes out there, and actually gets it done. Give me T-Rex to win this fight inside the distance.
Give me Maycee Barber to get back in the win column. Give me Maycee Barber to win this fight by decision.
Nazim Sadikhov is the side here at plus money... Give me Nazim Sadikhov after the first.

I think he ends up just doing a little bit more, having bigger moments. I think he's forward, I think he's first, and I think he gets it done on the scorecards. Give me Bruno Silva to win this fight by decision.
Give me Jalin Turner to win this fight by knockout.
Give me Aslan to win this fight by knockout.
Handesson Batista probably going to be on his best behavior here... give me Handesson Batista to win this fight by knockout.
I do think that he ends up winning. So, give me Myron Santos to win this fight by decision
